fields.label: Persona / system prompt
fields.help: Replaces the assistant's persona and behavior instructions. The structural output format the pipeline depends on (direction/tone tagging) is always preserved underneath, regardless of what you write here. Leave empty to use the default translator persona.

fields.label: Temperature
fields.help: Higher = more varied/creative phrasing, lower = more literal/consistent.

fields.label: Enable thinking mode
fields.help: Qwen3.5's chain-of-thought 'thinking' mode. Off by default for latency: verified live, a single translation took ~51s (1598 reasoning tokens) with thinking enabled vs. well under a second with it disabled. Turn this on only if you want higher-quality, much slower responses -- not recommended for real-time translation.
